basics.name: Nishant Sharma
basics.title: Full Stack Software Engineer
basics.summary: Full-stack engineer building Python, JavaScript, React, and cloud-backed applications with analytics dashboards, APIs, and deployment workflows.

description: Built and maintained full-stack React and Python applications with REST APIs and production deployment workflows.
Designed analytics dashboards that turned operational data into user-friendly visualizations for internal decision-making.
Owned API design, implementation, testing, and deployment for workflow automation features.
achievements: Reduced manual review time by automating profile parsing, consistency checks, and structured review outputs.

projects.problem: Needed to ingest resumes, LinkedIn exports, and portfolios into a unified profile.
projects.outcome: Shipped a full-stack workflow for parsing profile documents and generating structured JSON review outputs.

projects.problem: Needed repeatable cloud jobs for document processing and application workflows.
projects.outcome: Built serverless processing jobs with infrastructure-as-code and automated deployment.
